title: Emma's Sleepy Stars
synopsis: Little Emma gets ready for bed with help from Mama and Papa, watching the twinkling stars until she drifts off to sleep in this gentle bedtime story.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks yawning in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars twinkling above, gentle moonlight streaming through a window, ethereal atmosphere with pastel palette

pages.text: Mama helps Emma brush teeth. Papa reads a story.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks sitting between Mama and Papa in soft watercolor with dreamy purple and blue gradients, floating clouds around them, glowing stars overhead, round sleepy faces, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma with Mama and Papa getting ready for bed

pages.text: Emma looks up. Pretty stars twinkle. Night, night stars!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks lying in bed looking up at glowing stars in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, floating clouds, round sleepy face, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma looking at twinkling stars from her bed

pages.text: Emma closes eyes. Stars watch over her. Sweet dreams, Emma!

illustration.description: Sleeping Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks peaceful in bed with soft watercolor dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars watching over her, floating clouds, round sleepy face, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma sleeping peacefully under the stars

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: What does Emma do when she's sleepy?
questions.explanation: Emma yawns when she's sleepy because that's what we do when we're tired!

questions.question: Who helps Emma get ready for bed?
questions.explanation: Mama and Papa help Emma brush her teeth and read her a story before bed.

questions.question: What does Emma see in the sky?
questions.explanation: Emma sees pretty twinkling stars in the sky that watch over her while she sleeps.
